channel.title: Real Life on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Real Life on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Getting Older
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about getting older.

item.title: It's OK To Change Your Mind
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about that.

item.title: Stories I Won’t Tell
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about stories I won’t tell on this channel.

item.title: Being Real
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about being real.

item.title: Christmas. Christmas Never Changes.
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Christmas.

item.title: Cain On Games Update
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me. Tim Decided to do a Cain on Games update because, as you can see, things have changed, Lots of changes actually. So I I thought I’d spend a fun Friday walking through the changes so you guys can know what’s going on. First off, I have moved back to Southern California. I did that a little over a week ago my time, but remember I have a big queue — It’s like 6 weeks long, I think — on this channel. So, from your point of view, you kept seeing a bunch of videos that I filmed up in Seattle. Although you did see a video on Arcanum magic design that popped up in this place, These shelves had nothing in it I hadn’t unpacked It’s because someone who is a super mutant paid for a priority video and wanted to know about Arcanum magic design. So I dropped what I was doing and I talked about Arcanum, magic design, and colleges and magic tech and all that.

item.title: Lessons As An Old Person
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to share lessons I’ve learned as an old person.

item.title: Passivity
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about passivity.

item.title: Early Morning Workers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about early morning workers.

item.title: Maps
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about maps.

item.title: 3D Printing
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about 3D printing.

item.title: I'm Not A Typical Gamer
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how I’m not a typical gamer.

item.title: To My Fellow Game Developers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to my fellow game developers.

item.title: Silver Linings
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about silver linings.

item.title: "Right Mistake-Making"
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about right mistakemaking.

item.title: Channel Second Anniversary!
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about this Channel’s second anniversary.

item.title: A Day In The Life Of Moon Man
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about a day in the life of moonman.

item.title: My Bookshelves
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to talk about these bookshelves.

item.title: Raising Cain
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to tell you the story of Raising Cane, or how I went from being a baby to the gorgeous super hunk you see before you today.

item.title: Changes 2024
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about changes — well, changes as of 2024.

item.title: Game Lessons From Collecting Fragrances
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to talk about game lessons from collecting fragrances.

item.title: The Dog
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to talk about the dog.

item.title: A Real Life Fallout Story With Lasers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to tell you a real life Fallout story with lasers.

item.title: My Memorabilia Cabinets
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to walk you through my two glass cabinets of curio curios memorabilia, detris, from now, my 44th year in the game industry.

item.title: Wading In The Shallows
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about waiting in the shallows.

item.title: Dice
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about dice.

item.title: Channel Analytics (August 2024)
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Channel analytics.

item.title: Polarizing Stories
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about polarizing stories.

item.title: Good Lessons From A Bad Teacher
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about good Lessons From a Bad Teacher.

item.title: Effect Of This Channel On Me
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the effect of this channel on me.

item.title: Game Development Tunnel Vision
item.description: Sal SE, Tim, par gotcha. I bet you right now some of you are reaching for that YouTube translate button and some of you were thinking, whoa, Tim’s French accent is terrible, trust me, that’s been said. No, I’m doing this video about game development, tunnel vision, because it’s one of the things that occurred to me. I get a lot of questions about a lot of things and early on, when there were less of you, I would answer and say, oh, that’s not something I know or I can’t talk about it I did do a video on things I can’t or won’t answer, but since then there’s been a lot more questions that Encompass a lot more things, even about game development or tangentially related game development, that I literally cannot answer. I either don’t know it or I’m not qualified to answer.

item.title: Channel Memberships
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Channel memberships.

item.title: Coming Out Stories
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about some coming out stories that I have.

item.title: Pets
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about pets.

item.title: My Own Struggles With Nuance
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Nuance again.

item.title: Favorite Chocolate
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about my favorite chocolate.

item.title: I'm Naïve And Optimistic
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about how I’m naive and optimistic.

item.title: My 100k Award
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me Tim, well, this thing just [Music].

item.title: My Family History Book
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my family history book.

item.title: Digipick vs Sonic Screwdriver
item.description: Did you pick Sonic Screwdriver? Did you pick sonic?

item.title: Chocolate
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today’s Friday. So let’s talk about something fun.

item.title: Incorrect Assumptions
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about incorrect assumptions.

item.title: Challenge Yourself
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why you should challenge yourself and I’m going to cut to the Chase and tell you right now: success comes from challenging yourself.

item.title: I Censored My Own Video
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about my only self-censored video on this channel.

item.title: Making A YouTube Channel, Part 2
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim, and this is part two of making a YouTube channel.

item.title: Characters Named Cain
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim. Yesterday’s video was kind of heavy, so today’s video I want to go a little lighter and I want to talk about all the freaking characters named Kane.

item.title: Commenting On My Stories With Nuance
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Nuance again, particularly watching my videos and commenting on them.

item.title: Extrovert or Introvert?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer a question from echoness, who asks: Tim, which type of Personality are you?

item.title: Ambient Music
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about ambient music.

item.title: Making A YouTube Channel
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to digress from Game Dev and just talk a little bit about what

item.title: The Origin of Recipes In My Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about all those recipes that appeared in a lot of my video games.

item.title: Why I Don't Review Games
item.description: Foreign, It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why I don’t review other people’s games and, as a quick side note, why I haven’t been talking about The Outer Worlds very much, so real quick in the The Outer Worlds. I’m getting a lot of questions about it, but I’ve told you guys I’m working on The Outer Worlds too, so I’m a contractor with obsidian to give them consultancy on that game’s design. Many of your questions are things like: what do you wish wasn’t cut or what would you do different?

item.title: Being A Gay Game Developer
item.description: Hi, it’s me, Tim. It is June 1st, happy pride month.

item.title: My Personal Information
item.description: Hey everyone. I made a video this morning about being gay in the game industry and several people have left comments basically saying, hey, I don’t need to know any personal information, just stick to game development stories. Well, if you felt the need to leave a comment like that on that video but not on the one about me being colorblind, my guess is, your problem isn’t with me talking about personal information, just something to think about. Happy Pride.

item.title: Listening To My Stories With Nuance
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s Tim, so the last couple videos I made generated a lot of comments.

item.title: My Colorblindness and Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about color blindness and specifically my color blindness, which is a weird one, the weird form of it I want to talk to you about exactly what my color blindness is and then I want to talk about how it’s affected, how I play games and make games.

item.title: A Quick Note on Ads
item.description: So I just found out that some people are seeing ads in my videos. I did not think that ads would show up in unmonetized videos, but apparently they can be inserted. So what I’ve done is I turned on monetization, and immediately made all the ad skippable, and got rid of what are called mid-roll ads, which are ones that can show up in the middle of my videos. That’s the best I can do, except if I make videos that are, at least, it said, longer than eight minutes, but I tried it with some of my eight minute eight and a half minutes and it didn’t work. So it looks like it’s nine minutes or longer.

item.title: Introduction to "Cain on Games"!
item.description: Hi there, my name is Timothy Kane and I’ve been a professional game developer for more than 40 years. Back in the 80s, I made a game called Grand Slam bridge and most recently I made an RPG called The Outer Worlds. In between, I made a lot of other games.
